parameters.name: snapshotItemConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.dict("label", item['label'], "snapshotPrefix", item['snapshotPrefix'], "sourceConnectionIdentity", fromJSON(item['sourceConnectionIdentity']), "config", fromJSON(item['config']), "repo", fromJSON(item['repo']), "semaphoreConfigMapName", item['semaphoreConfigMapName'], "semaphoreKey", item['semaphoreKey'], "dependsOnProxySetups", fromJSON(toJSON(item))['dependsOnProxySetups'], "dependsOn", item['dependsOn'], "configChecksum", item['configChecksum'], "resourceUid", item['resourceUid'], "solrExternalBackupName", sprig.dig('solrExternalBackupName', '', item)))}}

parameters.name: kafkaClusterConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.dict("name", item['name'], "version", item['version'], "config", fromJSON(item['config']), "topics", fromJSON(item['topics']), "configChecksum", item['configChecksum'], "resourceUid", item['resourceUid']))}}

parameters.name: proxyConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.dict("name", item['name'], "sourceConfig", fromJSON(item['sourceConfig']), "sourceConnectionIdentity", fromJSON(item['sourceConnectionIdentity']), "kafkaConfig", fromJSON(item['kafkaConfig']), "proxyConfig", fromJSON(item['proxyConfig']), "configChecksum", sprig.dig('configChecksum', '', item), "topicConfigChecksum", sprig.dig('topicConfigChecksum', '', item), "checksumForSnapshot", sprig.dig('checksumForSnapshot', '', item), "checksumForReplayer", sprig.dig('checksumForReplayer', '', item), "resourceUid", item['resourceUid']))}}

parameters.name: loaderConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.dict("name", item['name'], "sourceLabel", item['sourceLabel'], "s3Uri", item['s3Uri'], "awsRegion", item['awsRegion'], "endpoint", sprig.dig('endpoint', '', item), "kafkaConfig", fromJSON(item['kafkaConfig']), "configChecksum", sprig.dig('configChecksum', '', item), "topicConfigChecksum", sprig.dig('topicConfigChecksum', '', item), "checksumForReplayer", sprig.dig('checksumForReplayer', '', item), "kafkaClusterName", sprig.dig('label', '', fromJSON(item['kafkaConfig'])), "resourceUid", sprig.dig('resourceUid', '', item)))}}
